name: Google Profile (edit page) — pskastner
description: Webarchive capture of Peter S. Kastner's Google Profile edit page (2009). Documents Kastner's personal email pskastner@gmail.com, his Google Profiles URLs (vanity http://www.google.com/profiles/pskastner and numeric http://www.google.com/profiles/110552360138965462985), and Google's offers to add his Picasa Web Albums (pskastner) and YouTube channel (catalina588) to the profile. Personal archive only; no Aberdeen/Scott-Page content beyond implicit identity.
